official_sources.evidence: ZebPay API service material describes reviewed API access covering spot and futures markets.
Current public docs are used for spot REST market/order surfaces; futures runtime remains unwired.

runtime_isolation: ZebPay futures/perpetual API access requires onboarding, product scope and bearer-token validation separate from the scan-only spot adapter.
unsupported_runtime_reason: ZebPay API service material covers futures, but stable futures endpoint specs, onboarding approval, positions/margin parsers and product-scoped bearer-token write/readback validation are not implemented.

market_metadata: funding or settlement schedule if exposed

stable endpoint specs for futures/perpetual market data and trading
